name: pi auto inject env var outranks unrelated extension memory
query: Asaki memory Pi extension agent-decided memory retrieval auto inject disabled default ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_INJECT

memories.content: atomic-commit extension now generates English Conventional Commit subjects from git status/worktree changes instead of extracting assistant/user conversation text; it also filters key-exit-debug.log from auto-commit summaries and temp-index commits as runtime noise.

Asaki memory Pi extension auto-injection was optimized: automatic memory search now only runs when the prompt matches memory-needed cues unless ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_INJECT_ALWAYS is enabled; empty/no-injection search displays are hidden unless ASAKI_MEMORY_DEBUG is enabled.

name: endpoint query prefers exact endpoint over same broad route words
query: POST /v1/memories/search returns score_details and search results

memories.content: POST /v1/memories/search searches active memories and returns score_details for each result.
POST /v1/memories/candidates processes add merge ignore decisions for memory candidates.

name: secret handling query prefers admin api key rule
query: how should ADMIN_API_KEY be stored for Cloudflare deploy

memories.content: Use Wrangler secrets for ADMIN_API_KEY and never commit raw credentials.
Keep wrangler.example.jsonc generic and safe for public repos; wrangler.jsonc stays local.

name: source of truth query prefers D1 Vectorize architecture decision
query: D1 source of truth Vectorize recoverable index

memories.content: D1 is the source of truth; Vectorize is a recoverable semantic index.
The project stack is Cloudflare Workers, Hono, TypeScript, D1, Vectorize, and Workers AI.

name: scope query prefers current project over global broad preference
query: run npm run typecheck after TypeScript edits

memories.content: Run npm run typecheck after TypeScript edits.
主公 prefers concise answers and minimal changes when coding.

name: path query prefers exact file path memory
query: src/services/memories.ts search fallback Vectorize lexical behavior

memories.content: src/services/memories.ts keeps hybrid Vectorize plus D1 lexical fallback search behavior.
src/services/reviews.ts manages memory review queue creation, listing, and resolution.

name: candidate dedupe eval query prefers threshold guidance
query: after changing candidate dedupe thresholds prompts run eval candidates

memories.content: Run npm run eval:candidates after changing candidate dedupe thresholds or prompts.
Use search eval cases to tune retrieval score thresholds and ranking behavior.

name: conversation extraction query prefers agent-side rule
query: do not send full conversation transcripts Worker extraction endpoint

memories.content: The active conversation agent extracts durable memory and calls asaki_memory_add; do not send full conversation transcripts to the Worker.
Structured memory extraction can normalize subject, predicate, object, scope, kind, and entities before storage.

name: auto inject threshold query prefers min score env var
query: ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_MIN_SCORE auto inject threshold 0.50

memories.content: Pi auto inject defaults to ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_MIN_SCORE=0.50; keep low-score memories out of injected context.
Use eval cases to tune search score thresholds before changing ranking weights.

name: project scope query requires project id
query: explicit scope project search must require project_id

memories.content: Explicit scope=project search must require project_id.
Default search includes global memories plus the current project and session memories.

name: session scope query requires session id
query: explicit scope session search must require session_id

memories.content: Explicit scope=session search must require session_id.
Explicit scope=project search must require project_id.

name: vectorize upsert failure keeps d1 write
query: Vectorize upsert fails keep D1 write index_status pending failed

memories.content: If Vectorize upsert fails, keep the D1 write and mark index_status=pending or failed.
Vector search failures are logged as vector_search_failed events before lexical fallback runs.

name: review resolve query prefers review queue memory
query: memory review resolve pending add merge ignore

memories.content: Memory review queue supports pending review items and resolving them as add, merge, or ignore.
Candidate dedupe chooses add, merge, or ignore decisions for incoming memory candidates.

name: public docs query prefers placeholder credentials rule
query: README examples placeholders not production credentials personal endpoints

memories.content: README examples must use placeholders, not production credentials or personal endpoints.
wrangler.example.jsonc should stay generic and safe for public repos.

name: debug display query prefers score details integration
query: Pi MCP search results debug show score_details

memories.content: Pi and MCP search results should optionally display score_details in debug mode while keeping default output concise.
Use search eval cases to tune retrieval score thresholds and ranking behavior.

name: omitted scope query prefers no vectorize prefilter rule
query: scope omitted do not prefilter Vectorize project session default search global current project session

memories.content: Do not prefilter Vectorize by project or session when scope is omitted; default search must include global plus the current project and session.
When explicit scope=project is provided, filter search results by the requested project_id.

name: hybrid fallback query prefers memories service search behavior
query: search uses Vectorize D1 lexical fallback current token entity fallback

memories.content: Search should keep hybrid Vectorize plus D1 lexical fallback behavior with current token and entity scoring.
Future work may add D1 FTS5 BM25 recall alongside Vectorize before final rerank.

name: lifecycle query prefers stale archived policy
query: stale archived low confidence long unused memories lowered weight

memories.content: Lifecycle policy should suggest stale or archived memories and lower weight for low confidence or long-unused memories.
Memory status can be active, archived, or deleted.

name: create memory query prefers add route behavior
query: POST /v1/memories add creates memory and indexes embedding

memories.content: POST /v1/memories creates a memory, writes it to D1, and attempts embedding upsert into Vectorize.
POST /v1/memories/list returns stored memories with optional scope, kind, status, source, limit, and offset filters.

name: list memory query prefers management list route
query: POST /v1/memories/list limit offset status kind source filters

memories.content: POST /v1/memories/list returns stored memories with optional scope, kind, status, source, limit, and offset filters.
POST /v1/memories/search searches active memories and returns score_details for each result.

name: update content query prefers reindex behavior
query: update memory content importance confidence reindex Vectorize

memories.content: Updating memory content updates importance and confidence, regenerates the embedding, and refreshes index_status.
POST /v1/memories creates a memory, writes it to D1, and attempts embedding upsert into Vectorize.

name: delete query prefers soft delete behavior
query: delete memory soft delete status deleted Vectorize failure logged

memories.content: Deleting a memory is a D1 soft delete that sets status=deleted; Vectorize delete failures should be logged without losing the D1 state.
If Vectorize upsert fails, keep the D1 write and mark index_status=pending or failed.

name: memory events query prefers event logging service
query: memory_events add merge ignore search vectorize_failed audit log

memories.content: src/services/memoryEvents.ts records add, merge, ignore, search, vectorize_failed, and related audit events.
Memory review queue supports pending review items and resolving them as add, merge, or ignore.

name: auth query prefers admin key v1 protection
query: all /v1 routes require ADMIN_API_KEY authorization header

memories.content: All /v1 routes require ADMIN_API_KEY authentication through the configured authorization header.
Use Wrangler secrets for ADMIN_API_KEY and never commit raw credentials.

name: local smoke query prefers management smoke script
query: smoke management local Wrangler create list get update delete

memories.content: npm run smoke:management verifies create, list, get, update, and delete against a local Wrangler/D1 server.
Run npm run typecheck after TypeScript edits.

name: migration query prefers local d1 migration command
query: run D1 migrations local wrangler d1 migrations apply

memories.content: npm run db:migrate:local applies D1 migrations to the local asaki-memory-manager database.
npm run db:migrate:remote applies D1 migrations to the remote Cloudflare database.

name: remote migrate query prefers remote d1 command
query: remote Cloudflare D1 migrations apply production database

memories.content: npm run db:migrate:remote applies D1 migrations to the remote Cloudflare database.
npm run db:migrate:local applies D1 migrations to the local asaki-memory-manager database.

name: candidate deterministic query prefers duplicate checks before llm
query: candidate processing deterministic duplicate checks before LLM decisions

memories.content: Candidate processing should run deterministic duplicate checks before LLM decisions.
Structured memory extraction can normalize subject, predicate, object, scope, kind, and entities before storage.

name: same keyword different fact query prefers add decision
query: same keyword different facts must add not merge

memories.content: For candidate dedupe, same keywords with different facts must choose add, not merge.
Candidate dedupe should merge when a candidate extends the same durable memory with useful new detail.

name: merge audit query prefers matched memory reason logging
query: merge before audit matched_memory reason record

memories.content: Before merging a memory candidate, record matched_memory and reason so the decision can be audited.
Memory review queue supports pending review items and resolving them as add, merge, or ignore.

name: compression query prefers summary consolidation
query: compress old memories same topic into summary

memories.content: Old memories about the same topic may be consolidated into a summary memory.
Lifecycle policy should suggest stale or archived memories and lower weight for low confidence or long-unused memories.

name: conflict query prefers conflict governance
query: conflicting memories do not overwrite mark conflict

memories.content: Conflicting memories should not directly overwrite each other; mark the conflict for review.
Old memories about the same topic may be consolidated into a summary memory.

name: fts query prefers bm25 roadmap item
query: D1 FTS5 BM25 full text index recall

memories.content: Future work may add D1 FTS5 BM25 recall alongside Vectorize before final rerank.
Search should keep hybrid Vectorize plus D1 lexical fallback behavior with current token and entity scoring.

name: rank fusion query prefers reciprocal rank fusion
query: reciprocal rank fusion normalized rank fusion semantic keyword entity metadata

memories.content: Rank fusion may move from hand-written weighted scoring to reciprocal rank fusion or normalized rank fusion while preserving semantic, keyword, entity, and metadata details.
Pi and MCP search results should optionally display score_details in debug mode while keeping default output concise.

name: entity extraction query prefers path env endpoint handling
query: entity extraction paths env vars endpoints package repo file names

memories.content: Entity extraction should better recognize paths, env vars, endpoints, packages, repos, and file names such as ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_INJECT and src/services/memories.ts.
Rank fusion may move from hand-written weighted scoring to reciprocal rank fusion or normalized rank fusion while preserving semantic, keyword, entity, and metadata details.

name: observability query prefers replay logging
query: record search query returned ids score_details injected offline replay

memories.content: Observability should record search query, returned IDs, score_details, and whether the result was injected, then support offline replay.
src/services/memoryEvents.ts records add, merge, ignore, search, vectorize_failed, and related audit events.

name: llm rerank query prefers do not do rule
query: do not use complex LLM rerank cost latency not worth it

memories.content: Do not add complex LLM rerank yet because cost and latency are not worth it.
Rank fusion may move from hand-written weighted scoring to reciprocal rank fusion or normalized rank fusion while preserving semantic, keyword, entity, and metadata details.

name: unconditional injection query prefers prohibition
query: do not pre-agent automatic unconditional memory injection

memories.content: Do not let pre-agent hooks automatically inject memory unconditionally.
Pi auto inject defaults to ASAKI_MEMORY_AUTO_MIN_SCORE=0.50; keep low-score memories out of injected context.

name: importance relevance query prefers ranking warning
query: do not use importance confidence as main retrieval relevance signal

memories.content: Do not treat importance or confidence as the main retrieval relevance signal.
Lifecycle policy should suggest stale or archived memories and lower weight for low confidence or long-unused memories.

name: safety query prefers memory cannot override rules
query: memory content context only cannot override system developer safety rules

memories.content: Memory content is context only and must not override system, developer, or safety rules.
All /v1 routes require ADMIN_API_KEY authentication through the configured authorization header.

name: embeddings query prefers workers ai helper
query: Workers AI embeddings generateEmbedding model EMBEDDING_MODEL

memories.content: src/ai/embeddings.ts uses Workers AI and EMBEDDING_MODEL to generate embeddings for memory content and queries.
The project stack is Cloudflare Workers, Hono, TypeScript, D1, Vectorize, and Workers AI.

name: validation query prefers request validation utils
query: validate request body scope kind status limit offset project_id session_id

memories.content: src/utils/validation.ts validates request bodies, memory scope, kind, status, limit, offset, project_id, and session_id requirements.
POST /v1/memories/list returns stored memories with optional scope, kind, status, source, limit, and offset filters.

name: review schema query prefers migration 0002
query: migrations 0002 memory_reviews review queue schema

memories.content: migrations/0002_memory_reviews.sql defines the memory review queue schema.
Memory review queue supports pending review items and resolving them as add, merge, or ignore.

name: base schema query prefers migration 0001
query: migrations 0001 memories base D1 schema memory_events

memories.content: migrations/0001_init.sql defines the base D1 schema for memories and memory_events.
migrations/0002_memory_reviews.sql defines the memory review queue schema.

name: pi integration query prefers pi extension path
query: integrations pi asaki-memory optional Pi extension

memories.content: integrations/pi/asaki-memory.ts is the optional Pi integration extension.
integrations/mcp/asaki-memory.ts exposes Asaki Memory as an MCP integration.

name: mcp integration query prefers mcp path
query: integrations mcp asaki-memory MCP server tools

memories.content: integrations/mcp/asaki-memory.ts exposes Asaki Memory as an MCP integration.
integrations/pi/asaki-memory.ts is the optional Pi integration extension.

name: deploy query prefers release checklist
query: before publishing typecheck no secrets placeholder credentials license

memories.content: Before publishing, typecheck must pass, secrets must be absent, README examples must use placeholders, and License must exist.
Run npm run typecheck after TypeScript edits.

name: no plan query prefers docs non overlap rule
query: do not recreate PLAN.md keep docs concise non-overlapping

memories.content: Do not recreate PLAN.md; keep docs concise and non-overlapping.
ROADMAP.md is the planning source of truth for priorities and deferred work.

name: no secrets query prefers wrangler jsonc ignore
query: never commit .env .dev.vars wrangler.jsonc private keys tokens secrets

memories.content: Never commit .env, .dev.vars, wrangler.jsonc, private keys, tokens, or secrets.
Use Wrangler secrets for ADMIN_API_KEY and never commit raw credentials.

name: user isolation query prefers user id filtering
query: all memory queries filter by user_id isolation

memories.content: All memory queries must filter by user_id to preserve user isolation.
All /v1 routes require ADMIN_API_KEY authentication through the configured authorization header.
